value.description:
A wooden box made up of planks designed to store resources in an efficient manner. Items stored inside will not affect room beauty and will never deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 4 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything

A wooden box made up of planks designed to store resources in an efficient manner. Items stored inside will not affect room beauty and will never deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything

A trusty wagon to carry novelties, artifacts, and goods across the unforgiving lands of the rim. Can be used to store items.

Allowed items: Everything

Allowed items: Everything

Allowed items: Everything

A cylindrical barrel reserved for wood to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of wood. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Wood logs

A cylindrical barrel reserved for iron ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of iron ore. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Iron ore

A cylindrical barrel reserved for silver ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of silver ore. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Silver ore

A cylindrical barrel reserved for gold ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of gold ore. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Gold ore

A cylindrical barrel reserved for gold ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of raw plasteel. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Raw plasteel

A cylindrical barrel reserved for coal ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of coal ore. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Coal

A cylindrical barrel reserved for textiles to save space. up to 4 stacks of textiles. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.

Allowed items: Textiles

<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Leather

<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Components

A cylindrical barrel reserved for wood ore to save space. Can hold up to 4 stacks of grapes. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 8 Stack per tile: 8
Allowed items: Grapes

A trusty wooden chest to store your personal belongings. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.Multiple chests do not stack comfort bonuses.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 4 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything

A trusty metal strongbox to store your personal belongings. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside. Multiple chests do not stack comfort bonuses.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 4 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything

An ornate chest store by the nobles. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside. Multiple chests do not stack comfort bonuses.
<color=#E5E54C>Storage stats:</color> Stack size total: 4 Stack per tile: 4
Allowed items: Everything
